raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "A comprehensive and collaborative strategy is essential to successfully phase out offshore oil production off the coast of California.",
    "The considerations for decommissioning offshore oil production are myriad and very complex.",
    "There are risks posed by offshore oil production to marine life.",
    "Decommissioning efforts can affect workers in the oil industry.",
    "Offshore drilling in federal waters must end to protect California's coastal ecosystem.",
    "California's coast has some of the most diverse marine life in the world.",
    "The State Building Trades have built the vast majority of California's renewable energy.",
    "Decommissioning projects for offshore oil platforms mark the end of an era.",
    "The decisions regarding decommissioning should be based on the best available science.",
    "California's offshore oil and gas platforms have developed into de facto reefs and are among the most productive ecosystems on the planet.",
    "Repurposing offshore platforms as permanent artificial reefs serves as an alternative to complete removal."
  ]
}
```
